name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
overview: This belt grants benefits related to dwarven culture and abilities.

all_wearers.persuasion: You have Advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks made to interact with dwarves and duergar
all_wearers.constitution: Your Constitution increases by 2, to a maximum of 20

properties.beard_growth: While attuned to the belt, you have a 50 percent chance each day at dawn of growing a full beard if you can grow one, or a thicker beard if you already have one

non_dwarf_benefits.applies_to: If you aren't a dwarf or duergar

resilience.poison_resistance: You have Resistance to Poison damage
resilience.poison_immunity: You also have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Poisoned condition
